diagrams.title: Tree with Pendant Vertices Labeled
diagrams.description: A tree showing pendant vertices (leaves) in green, internal vertices in blue
diagrams.purpose: Identify and understand pendant vertices in trees

diagrams.title: Distance Measurement in Tree
diagrams.description: Path highlighted showing distance between two non-adjacent vertices
elements: Vertex A to Vertex B path highlighted
diagrams.purpose: Understand distance as number of edges in unique path

diagrams.title: Center Finding Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step leaf removal showing how centers are determined
elements: Step 1: Original tree with leaves circled
diagrams.purpose: Visualize algorithm for finding tree centers

diagrams.title: Radius vs Diameter Illustration
diagrams.description: Tree showing radius from center and diameter between farthest points
elements: Radius shown as distance from center to farthest leaf
Diameter shown as longest path between two leaves
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between radius and diameter concepts
